name: UNESCO Institute for Statistics (UIS) Data API
description: The UIS Data API provides programmatic access to UNESCO Institute for Statistics data covering education, science, technology, innovation, culture, and demographic/socioeconomic indicators. Supports querying indicator data by geo-units and indicators, with export capabilities in CSV, Excel, and JSON formats. Data is versioned and organized by themes including Education, Science/Technology/Innovation, Culture, and Demographic/Socioeconomic statistics.
